title: Imu Steps Out from the Empty Throne
description: On pages 7–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9, Revolutionary Army as World events shift toward Cross Guild, Sabo’s account of the Levely, Cobra’s death, Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionary Army’s next move.
scene: World events shift toward Cross Guild, Sabo’s account of the Levely, Cobra’s death, Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionary Army’s next move.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What would you do if some- thing were to happen to me?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I've had enough! I'll walk myself!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Consider yourself fired, you useless piece of trash!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Who do you think you are?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Escape to the East of the City...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Let's riddle this scum with bullets!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Blast him till there's nothing left!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: > Northern captain of the revolutionary army. [16] Mr. (A) is] ate the soot-spot fruit.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: hurry up! Gather at the east side of the city!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: We're gonna get you outta here, okay!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You can thank us when you're free!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: They're really going at it over there!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: THEY'RE HEADED THIS WAY. HURRY UP AND RELEASE EVERYONE!
